economic_notes: First Nation consolidated Neskantaga Economic Development Corporation. Portfolio investment of $255,000 in 2317186 Ontario Limited o/a Happy Time Tours and Travel (15% ownership). Capital projects include new water treatment plant, police detachment, CMHC rapid housing, and community access/supply roads. COVID-19 impacted program delivery and capital project progress.
notes: Audit is qualified due to incomplete tangible capital asset inventory — First Nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150 and cannot confirm completeness of capital asset records. Fiscal year is 2022 (ended March 31, 2022), not 2024. No schedule of remuneration included in document. Capital Projects segment shows large surplus of $8.7M driven by ISC funding for water treatment plant and other infrastructure. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $10.6M to $18.2M largely due to CMHC Rapid Housing ($4.15M) and ISC Band Operated Schools and water treatment plant deferrals. Loss on disposal of tangible capital assets of $68,600 recorded.
